name: Infracommerce Cxaas S.A.
summary: Infracommerce Cxaas S.A. provides integrated digital solutions for the e-commerce operations of brands and industries in Brazil. The company's operations cover platform, marketing, content, payment, logistics, and customer services. It also has operations in Mexico, Colombia, Chile, and Argentina. The company was founded in 2012 and is headquartered in S√É¬£o Paulo, Brazil.
